reviews.author: Aneesh Kumar K.V
reviews.summary: Raised concern that caching top-tier nodes could lead to a larger window of incorrect results from node_is_toptier() calls, and questioned the performance impact.

2026-07-12.patch_summary: This patch optimizes the memory-tiers code by caching top-tier nodes on memory node hotplug events, reducing redundant tier distance checks in various hot paths.
